author: doll-agent
content: Added inverse_transform to FittedIncrementalPCA (X_reduced @ components + mean), FittedTruncatedSVD (X_reduced @ components, no mean), FittedNMF (W @ H), and FittedFactorAnalysis (Z @ components.T + mean — note ferrolearn FA stores components shape (n_features, n_components), transposed relative to sklearns layout). Skipped FittedKernelPCA (requires fit_inverse_transform=True flag with kernel ridge fit; deferred as a separate concern). All 410 tests pass.
